reviews.title: Awsome speaker

reviews.title: We love this speaker
reviews.text: Super happy with. Great bass and loud sound overall. Is waterproof, tested by my preteen. Love the color changing. Have had for a couple years now, still works perfectly.great deal. I think $99 at the time, back in 2022. There’s also a button to turn off the color changing lights if you want.

reviews.title: Buy this. Buy Two. Still Better/Cheaper than JBL
reviews.text: Louder and better quality than just about all portable bluetooth speakers (and plug in) $300 and under. Do not buy portable bluetooth speakers on "name brand." These speakers give an better all around audio experience than its JBL and MARSHALL competitors. Buy this. Buy Two. They can be paired together! Still Better/Cheaper than JBLs range of extremes, charges, flips and Marshalls Acton, Stockmore, ect

reviews.title: The pups enjoy it

reviews.title: Awesome Speaker!!!
reviews.text: Great portable speaker. Its nice to have on hand when you plan on jamming with friends and or jamming while being at home.
reviews.author: Deathgear

reviews.title: I'm surprised, nice NATURAL sound and Im a pro
reviews.text:
I purchased as gift for the wife to use at the beach and pool. The wife loves it and uses it every sunny weekend! A year later I decided to give it a listen, as a pro sound engineer and a long time Audiophile I'm blown away! 
This thing sounds VERY GOOD! Has a very natural sound seldom seen in inexpensive audio products. The sound is natural as the human vice sounds real, a snare drum sounds like a snare drum and guitar sounds natural. Had great low end but understand this is not party size boom, its more low to mid volume applications but its the best sound ( as in most natural and good full frequency sound from anything this small size. I have had great luck with Soundcore ( Anker) headphone. Need something small and portable with nice sound, this is it!
reviews.author: Soundman

reviews.title: Nice BT boombox
reviews.text: Good battery life; decent sound considering how small this is.  The LED colored light is...good for kids who like those thing.  It is a little bulky, but otherwise fairly well built.

reviews.title: Worth the Money!
reviews.text: Absolutely love this speaker! Bought it for my forklift at work in 2022 and it still works perfectly fine here in November 2023. This speaker really turns a shower into a concert with the boosted bass. Love that you can customize and control it through the Soundcore app on IOS. It tells you the exact battery percentage too! It’s just as good as JBL speaker that’s the same size.

reviews.title: Soundcore does it right!
reviews.text: Absolutely Love this compact Soundcore Bluetooth speaker! For something small it sounds great at low or high volumes. If you are looking for a Bluetooth speaker in this price range then this is one to seriously consider.  I highly recommend it.
reviews.author: Sonic

reviews.title: Well Built But Lacks Bass
reviews.text: We bought this boombox we wanted something out by the pool and hot tub and it was on sale. The description and some reviews described how well it handled the bass part of the sound. Well... it leaves a lot to be desired. It is very well made and has pretty good battery life. If flashing lights are your thing - look no further. But if you want great sound, pass this one by. It's headed to our eBay store...

reviews.author: Letty

reviews.title: Great speaker and big sound for the money
reviews.text: Great sound, battery life seems great so far.  Only complaints- 1) no buttons on the speaker to skip or rewind (often easier than doing on your phone), 2) did not include AC charger brick, just USB-C cable; yes we can use any brick, but how do we know its being fed the correct voltage and amps?, and 3) removing the rubber tab that covers the USB-C port (to charge) is a little tough to remove, at least at first.  Its good that it'll hopefully keep it safe from water if splashed, but still a bit of a hassle.  But overall, big sound and great speaker so far especially for a relatively low price.
